\tzpentry{ID5606}{Density Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5606 introduces Density Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho\,\ddot{\bm{u}}=(\lambda+\mu)\nabla(\nabla\cdot\bm{u})+\mu\nabla^2\bm{u}+\bm{f}_{\rm EM}+\bm{f}_{\rm fold}, \end{equation}
